nasb.text: with whom the Lord made a covenant and commanded them, saying, “You shall not fear other gods, nor bow down yourselves to them nor serve them nor sacrifice to them.

esv.text: The Lord made a covenant with them and commanded them, “You shall not fear other gods or bow yourselves to them or serve them or sacrifice to them,

cnv.text: 耶和華曾經和他們立約，又吩咐他們說：“你們不可崇敬別的神，不可跪拜他們，不可服事他們，也不可向他們獻祭。

ccb.text: 与他的子孙立约，吩咐他们：“不可祭拜其他神明，不可跪拜和供奉他们，也不可向他们献祭。
